title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking - Don't Allow - Enable Now - Allow While Using App [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Verify location permission flow during onboarding: user declines permission initially, then later grants "While Using the App" permission via Find My Device, and confirms correct popup text and navigation at each step.
steps: 8. Log in or continue as guest
12. Grant 'While Using the App' permission in Location Services
expected: Permission popup text is correct and navigation behavior is correct at each step.
